headline: A Look At Constellation Energy (CEG) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Constellation Energy (CEG) has drawn investor attention after a period of mixed share performance, with gains over the past year alongside declines over the past month and past three months. See our latest analysis for Constellation Energy. Despite a recent 30 day share price return of around a 9% decline and a 90 day share price return of about a 15% decline from the latest close of US$298.61, Constellation Energy still shows strong longer term momentum with a 1 year total shareholder return...

headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG): Should You Buy?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: ArcLight in deal to buy 2.2 GW from InfraBridge, mainly gas
summary: The transaction would give the private equity firm an additional 1.1 GW in the PJM Interconnection where it owns about 9.7 GW, according to an application at the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission.

headline: Review & Preview: Off-Ramp Emerging?
summary: Stocks rallied on the news Iran’s president signaled the country could be ready to end the war, though neither side has seemingly come to an agreement on terms.  Meanwhile, President Donald Trump is reportedly considering ending the airstrike campaign, even if the Strait of Hormuz is not reopened.  The Dow rose 1,125 points, or 2.5%.
